[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Keten''' was a commander in the service of [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kurlen Flennic]] during the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He had a deep, guttural voice and conducted himself in an officious manner.<ref name="FHI">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''</ref>

After the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] expedition aboard the ''[[Jade Shadow]]'' fled from the [[Battle of Bastion]], they arrived in [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]]. A [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] patrol quickly noticed their presence, after which they were confronted by Keten, who demanded to know their intentions and also ordered that the [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalkers]] prepare to be boarded.<ref name="FHI" />

As the Skywalkers conferred, Keten approached them in an armed Imperial transport, accompanied by a dozen TIE Fighters. After a short time, he demanded a response. Wary of the situation, [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] decided to invite Keten aboard, as she reasoned that a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] would allow them resolve the situation. However, Keten was wary of Jedi mind tricks, and informed Jade Skywalker that the boarding party would consist solely of Mark Five security droids.<ref name="FHI" />

Before his ship could dock with the ''Jade Shadow'', Keten was ordered to stand down by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Arien Yage]] of the [[Widowmaker (frigate)|''Widowmaker'']]. Outranked, Keten submitted to Captain Yage's authority, and requested it be on record he did so under protest.<ref name="FHI" />
